title: ESM dual-package - exports field, CJS backward-compat preserved
goal: Expose a package entry that supports both ESM import and CommonJS require without flipping the CLI or the existing internal .js modules to ESM.
verificationCommands: node --input-type=module -e "import pkg, { workspace } from 'agent-workflow-studio'; import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); const cjs = require('agent-workflow-studio'); if (workspace !== cjs.workspace || pkg.workspace !== cjs.workspace) { throw new Error('dual-package hazard detected'); } console.log('shared-singleton-ok');"
